name: hyperweave
description: HyperWeave Living Artifact Protocol - Zero-JS SVG badge generation with embedded provenance

tools.name: hw_discover_capabilities
tools.description: Discover HyperWeave capabilities and optimal workflows. USE THIS FIRST.

tools.name: hw_query_ontology
tools.description: Query themes, motions, glyphs, and effects from the v7 ontology.

tools.name: hw_use_specimen
tools.description: Generate badge from pre-validated specimen (GOLDEN PATH).

tools.name: hw_validate
tools.description: Validate SVG against Living Artifact Protocol.

resources.description: Ontology summary with theme tiers, motions, and series

metadata.formula: BADGE = THEME(state) x CONTENT x MOTION
